name: Private Office
desc: Secure your own dedicated, fully-furnished space built for focus and confidentiality. Our Private Offices are perfect for small teams or individuals who need a permanent, branded hub where they can work without distraction.

name: Meeting Room
desc: Professional, technology-equipped rooms designed for seamless collaboration and client presentations. Choose the right size, from intimate huddle rooms to large boardrooms, all with plug-and-play simplicity.

name: Podcast Studio
desc: Step into our acoustically-treated, soundproof studio, ready with professional-grade microphones, mixers, and lighting. This is the ultimate dedicated space to record high-quality audio and video content without interference.
